case_title: JACK KNOX ET AL VS. BIG BOYS TIRES & WHEELS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BIG BOYS TIRES & WHEELS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM AMANDA FISHER. FILED BY KNOX, JACK KNOX, RONNY BIG BOYS TIRES & WHEELS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED NOV-03-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BIG BOYS TIRES & WHEELS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KNOX, JACK KNOX, RONNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIG BOYS TIRES & WHEELS $3,004.40 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,104.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY KNOX, JACK KNOX, RONNY AS TO DEFENDANT BIG BOYS TIRES & WHEELS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
